controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the master direction on incentives and penal provisions for bank branches and ccs in respect of currency operations
controls.control_description:
1.1 These Directions shall be called the Master Direction on Incentives and penal
provisions for bank branches and CCs in respect of currency operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the master direction on incentives and penal provisions for bank branches and ccs in respect of currency operations

controls.control_objective: To ensure become effective on the day these are placed on the official website of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
1.2 These directions shall become effective on the day these are placed on the
official website of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to become effective on the day these are placed on the official website of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ascertained by the concerned issue office (io) of rbi at the time of reimbursement of cost to the bank
controls.control_description:
The actual nature of
expenditure shall be ascertained by the concerned Issue Office (IO) of RBI at the time
of reimbursement of cost to the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ascertained by the concerned issue office (io) of rbi at the time of reimbursement of cost to the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure a note which has become dirty due to normal wear and tear and also includes a two-piece note pasted together wherein both the pieces presented belong
controls.control_description:
4.6 Soiled Note
A 'soiled note' means a note which has become dirty due to normal wear and tear and
also includes a two-piece note pasted together wherein both the pieces presented
belong to the same note and form the entire note with no essential feature missing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a note which has become dirty due to normal wear and tear and also includes a two-piece note pasted together wherein both the pieces presented belong

controls.control_objective: To ensure a note of which a portion is missing or which is composed of more than two pieces
controls.control_description:
4.7 Mutilated Note
A 'mutilated note' means a note of which a portion is missing or which is composed of
more than two pieces.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a note of which a portion is missing or which is composed of more than two pieces

controls.control_objective: To ensure any note, which is wholly or partially, obliterated, shrunk, washed, altered or indecipherable but does not include a mutilated note
controls.control_description:
4.8 Imperfect Note
An 'imperfect note' means any note, which is wholly or partially, obliterated, shrunk,
washed, altered or indecipherable but does not include a mutilated note.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any note, which is wholly or partially, obliterated, shrunk, washed, altered or indecipherable but does not include a mutilated note

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid for coin distribution in rural and semi-urban areas on the submission of a concurrent auditor (ca) certificate to this effect
controls.control_description:
An additional incentive of ₹10/- per bag shall be
paid for coin distribution in rural and semi-urban
areas on the submission of a Concurrent Auditor
(CA) certificate to this effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid for coin distribution in rural and semi-urban areas on the submission of a concurrent auditor (ca) certificate to this effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid on the basis of:
controls.control_description: 2.1 The incentives in respect of bank notes shall be paid on the basis of:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid on the basis of:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid on the basis of net withdrawal from the cc
controls.control_description:
2.2 The incentive for distribution of coins shall be paid on the basis of net withdrawal
from the CC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid on the basis of net withdrawal from the cc

controls.control_objective: To ensure raise invoice to rbi for claiming incentives
controls.control_description: 2.3 The CC holding banks shall raise invoice to RBI for claiming incentives.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to raise invoice to rbi for claiming incentives

controls.control_objective: To ensure pass on the incentive to the linked branches for the soiled
controls.control_description: 2.4 The CC branch shall pass on the incentive to the linked branches for the soiled
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pass on the incentive to the linked branches for the soiled

controls.control_objective: To ensure be verified by rbi regional offices through inspection of ccs/ incognito visit to branches, etc
controls.control_description:
2.5 The distribution of coins shall be verified by RBI Regional Offices through
inspection of CCs/ incognito visit to branches, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be verified by rbi regional offices through inspection of ccs/ incognito visit to branches, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure strengthen their systems/ mechanisms to monitor availability of cash in atms and ensure timely replenishment to avoid cash-outs
controls.control_description:
Banks / White Label ATM Operators (WLAOs) shall strengthen
their systems/ mechanisms to monitor availability of cash in ATMs and ensure timely
replenishment to avoid cash-outs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strengthen their systems/ mechanisms to monitor availability of cash in atms and ensure timely replenishment to avoid cash-outs

controls.control_description:
levy of such penalty shall be placed in
public domain.

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be applicable to wlaos
controls.control_description:
This shall also be
applicable to WLAOs.

the instances when the customer is not

able to withdraw cash due to non-

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit system generated statement on downtime of atms due to non-replenishment of cash to the io of rbi under whose jurisdiction these atms are locate
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, banks/WLAOs shall submit system generated statement on
downtime of ATMs due to non-replenishment of cash to the IO of RBI under whose
jurisdiction these ATMs are located.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit system generated statement on downtime of atms due to non-replenishment of cash to the io of rbi under whose jurisdiction these atms are locate

controls.control_objective: To ensure to report the total hours in a month when the atm was not functioning due to cash-out, for the atms where the cash-out is more than 10 hours in a mont
controls.control_description:
The banks/ WLAOs are required to report the total
hours in a month when the ATM was not functioning due to cash-out, for the ATMs
where the cash-out is more than 10 hours in a month.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to report the total hours in a month when the atm was not functioning due to cash-out, for the atms where the cash-out is more than 10 hours in a mont

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted every month by end of the ensuing month
controls.control_description:
The duly audited such
statements shall be submitted every month by end of the ensuing month.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted every month by end of the ensuing month

balances

controls.control_description:
The recovery of loss and levy of penalty shall
be done immediately on detection of
shortage, irrespective of number of pieces.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied for the denominations in which shortages are found, irrespective of whether any excess is found in any other denomination in the same snr
controls.control_description:
Penalty as above, shall be levied for the
denominations in which shortages are found,
irrespective of whether any excess is found
in any other denomination in the same SNR.

controls.control_description:
The value of excess shall be adjusted

recovery.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable
controls.control_description:
Chapter IV - Penal Provisions for Reporting of Transactions/ Balances at CCs
To ensure smooth operations of the CCs and timely and accurate reporting of CC
transactions following guidelines shall be applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ₹50,000/-and thereafter, in multiples of ₹10,000/-
controls.control_description:
1.1 Minimum Transaction Amount
The minimum amount of deposit into / withdrawal from CC shall be ₹50,000/-and
thereafter, in multiples of ₹10,000/-.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ₹50,000/-and thereafter, in multiples of ₹10,000/-

controls.control_objective: To ensure invariably report all transactions through cym-cc portal on the same day by 7 pm
controls.control_description:
1.2 Reporting Timelines
The CCs shall invariably report all transactions through CyM-CC portal on the same
day by 7 pm.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to invariably report all transactions through cym-cc portal on the same day by 7 pm

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the transactions in cym on the same day by 7 pm
controls.control_description:
on a local holiday), the CC shall report the transactions in CyM on the same day
by 7 PM.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the transactions in cym on the same day by 7 pm

controls.control_objective: To ensure report denomination-wise consolidated deposit and/ or withdrawal amount and denomination-wise chest closing balance of the day by 7 pm to the concerne
controls.control_description:
on a global
holiday/ 2nd or 4th Saturdays of the month/ Sunday), the CC shall report
denomination-wise consolidated deposit and/ or withdrawal amount and
denomination-wise chest closing balance of the day by 7 pm to the concerned Issue
Office of RBI by e-mail and report day's transactions in CyM on the next working day.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report denomination-wise consolidated deposit and/ or withdrawal amount and denomination-wise chest closing balance of the day by 7 pm to the concerne

controls.control_objective: To ensure be restored to the original cc
controls.control_description:
On completion of the transactions
the user rights shall be restored to the original CC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be restored to the original cc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained for audit purposes
controls.control_description:
Proper record of such
authorisations shall be maintained for audit purposes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained for audit purposes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered on case-to-case basis
controls.control_description:
Relaxation in the
reporting period on account of strike situation shall be considered on case-to-case
basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered on case-to-case basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken to ensure that remittances of fresh / re-issuable notes sent to ccs from rbi / note printing presses are not reported as 'deposit' transactio
controls.control_description:
Particular care shall be taken to ensure that
remittances of fresh / re-issuable notes sent to CCs from RBI / Note Printing Presses
are not reported as 'deposit' transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken to ensure that remittances of fresh / re-issuable notes sent to ccs from rbi / note printing presses are not reported as 'deposit' transactio

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied in all cases where the bank has enjoyed 'ineligible' credit in its current account with reserve bank on account of delayed / wrong reporting
controls.control_description:
Penal interest shall be levied in all cases
where the bank has enjoyed 'ineligible' credit in its current account with Reserve Bank
on account of delayed / wrong reporting of transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied in all cases where the bank has enjoyed 'ineligible' credit in its current account with reserve bank on account of delayed / wrong reporting

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as instances of wrong reporting and shall attract penal interest
controls.control_description:
If such amounts are included in the chest balances,
these shall be treated as instances of wrong reporting and shall attract penal interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as instances of wrong reporting and shall attract penal interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied from the date of inclusion of 'ineligible' amounts in chest balances till the exclusion of such amounts from chest balances as mentioned bel
controls.control_description:
(ii) In all the above cases (except shortages in chest balances / remittances, shortages
due to pilferage / frauds, counterfeit banknotes detected in chest balances /
remittances), penal interest shall be levied from the date of inclusion of 'ineligible'
amounts in chest balances till the exclusion of such amounts from chest balances as
mentioned below:
Sr.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied from the date of inclusion of 'ineligible' amounts in chest balances till the exclusion of such amounts from chest balances as mentioned bel

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied on the amount due from the cc for the period of delay / till the date of receipt of corrected advice by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Delayed / Wrong
In the event of delayed / wrong reporting CC
reporting of CC
transactions, penal interest at the rate of 2% over the
transaction
prevailing Bank Rate shall be levied on the amount due
from the CC for the period of delay / till the date of
receipt of corrected advice by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied on the amount due from the cc for the period of delay / till the date of receipt of corrected advice by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated on t+0 basis (t being the date of transaction)
controls.control_description:
Penal
interest shall be calculated on T+0 basis (T being the
date of transaction).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated on t+0 basis (t being the date of transaction)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown as withdrawal by ccs and in case of such reporting penalty shall be levied
controls.control_description:
3.1 Reporting of Soiled note remittances to RBI
Soiled note remittances sent to RBI shall not be shown as withdrawal by CCs and in
case of such reporting penalty shall be levied.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown as withdrawal by ccs and in case of such reporting penalty shall be levied

controls.control_objective: To ensure initiate the entry and the receiving cc should acknowledge the same
controls.control_description:
The CC
sending the diversion should initiate the entry and the receiving CC should
acknowledge the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to initiate the entry and the receiving cc should acknowledge the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied
controls.control_description:
Diversions should not be reported as deposit / withdrawal and
in case of any such wrong reporting penalty shall be levied.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied

controls.control_objective: To ensure be charged
controls.control_description:
3.3 Delayed reporting where CCs had 'Net Deposit'
For delayed reporting of instances where CCs had reported 'net deposit', penal interest
shall not be charged.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be charged

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied for such delayed reporting as under: sr
controls.control_description:
However, to ensure discipline in reporting of CC transaction, a
flat penalty shall be levied for such delayed reporting as under:
Sr.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied for such delayed reporting as under: sr

controls.control_objective: To ensure b
controls.control_description:
A flat penalty of ₹50,000/- shall
b.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to b

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the officer-in-charge of the issue department of the regional office under whose jurisdiction the defaulting cc / bank branch / atm is located
controls.control_description:
Competent Authority
The Competent Authority to decide on the nature of irregularity and levy penal interest/
penalty thereof shall be the Officer-in-Charge of the Issue Department of the Regional
Office under whose jurisdiction the defaulting CC / bank branch / ATM is located.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the officer-in-charge of the issue department of the regional office under whose jurisdiction the defaulting cc / bank branch / atm is located

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide whether the same can be accepted (in full or part) / rejected
controls.control_description:
Appellate Authority
Appeal against the decision of the Competent Authority may be made by the
Controlling Office of the CC / bank branch to the Regional Director / Chief General
Manage-r / Officer-in-Charge of the Regional Office concerned, within one month
from the date of debit / imposition of penalty, who shall decide whether the same
can be accepted (in full or part) / rejected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to decide whether the same can be accepted (in full or part) / rejected

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made in routine manner
controls.control_description:
Appeals shall not be made in routine
manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made in routine manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered
controls.control_description:
3.1 Appeals for waiver of penalty made on grounds such as staff being new/ untrained,
lack of awareness, corrective action having been taken/ shall be taken, etc., shall not
be considered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered

controls.control_objective: To ensure ordinarily be no occasion for banks to request for reconsideration of the reserve bank's decision on penal interest / penalty imposed for delayed repo
controls.control_description:
3.2 Given the business continuity capability provided by the CyM, there should
ordinarily be no occasion for banks to request for reconsideration of the Reserve
Bank's decision on penal interest / penalty imposed for delayed reporting of
transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ordinarily be no occasion for banks to request for reconsideration of the reserve bank's decision on penal interest / penalty imposed for delayed repo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made to the appellate authority
controls.control_description:
However, representations, if any, on account of genuine difficulties faced
by CCs especially in hilly/ remote areas and those affected by natural calamities, etc.,
may be made to the appellate authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made to the appellate authority

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered, only if the application for the same is made in the cym-cc portal within the prescribed timelines
controls.control_description:
3.3 Any penalty/ penal interest waiver request shall be considered, only if the
application for the same is made in the CyM-CC portal within the prescribed timelines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered, only if the application for the same is made in the cym-cc portal within the prescribed timelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply for waiver request through email to the concerned regional office
controls.control_description:
Non-CC holding banks, not having credentials of CyM-CC portal may apply for waiver
request through email to the concerned Regional Office.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply for waiver request through email to the concerned regional office

controls.control_objective: To ensure be entertained
controls.control_description:
Waiver requests in any other
mode shall not be entertained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be entertained

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered
controls.control_description: 3.4 In the case of wrong reporting, representation for waiver shall not be considered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered as valid grounds for waiver of penal interest
controls.control_description:
3.5 As the intention behind the levy of penal interest/ penalty is to inculcate discipline
among banks so as to ensure prompt/ correct reporting, requests by banks for waiver
of penal interest on grounds that delayed/ wrong reporting did not result in utilisation
of the Reserve Bank's funds or shortfall in the maintenance of CRR/ SLR or that they
were the result of clerical mistakes, unintentional or arithmetical errors, first time error,
inexperience of staff, expiry of digital certificate, etc., shall not be considered as valid
grounds for waiver of penal interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered as valid grounds for waiver of penal interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure be imposed
controls.control_description: For each instance of such violation, a monetary penalty of ₹10,000/- shall be imposed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be imposed

controls.control_description:
of counterfeit notes detected at RBI
0 0 4 9 40 2 2 1
Then the penalty imposed for the counterfeit notes detected shall be as under:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as under: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recovered
controls.control_description:
Denomination of ₹50: Recovery of notional value of counterfeit notes i.e.,
₹50*9= ₹450 and penalty @ 50% of the notional value i.e., ₹225, i.e., a total
of ₹675 shall be recovered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recovered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recovered
controls.control_description:
A total of ₹99,300 shall be
recovered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recovered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied
controls.control_description:
Non-compliance with operational guidelines by CCs detected by RBI officials
In case of non-functioning of CCTV, non-compliance with rules / guidelines pertaining
to CCTV recording, preservation period, and related issues, penalty of ₹5,000/- for
each instance of irregularity shall be levied.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied

controls.control_objective: To ensure be enhanced to ₹10,000/- in case of repetition / recurrence of irregularity in consecutive inspection cycles or earlier
controls.control_description:
Penalty shall be enhanced to ₹10,000/- in
case of repetition / recurrence of irregularity in consecutive inspection cycles or earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be enhanced to ₹10,000/- in case of repetition / recurrence of irregularity in consecutive inspection cycles or earlier
